name: Bemus Point
description: Bemus Point is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jamestown, NY. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Brocton Elementary Gym
description: Brocton Elementary Gym is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brocton, NY. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Chautauqua Tennis Center
description: Chautauqua Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Mayville, NY. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — $10 fee for open play pickup games

name: Dunkirk Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Dunkirk Pickleball Courts in Dunkirk, NY! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Edward F Loomis Junior Park
description: Edward F Loomis Junior Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ashville, NY. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Forestville Municipal Park
description: Forestville Municipal Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Forestville, NY. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Lakewood Family YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Lakewood Family YMCA in Lakewood, NY! There are 12 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Michael LaGrega Memorial Field
description: Michael LaGrega Memorial Field is a place to play pickleball in Lakewood, NY. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Northlake Family Recreation
description: Northlake Family Recreation is a place to play pickleball in Westfield, NY. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Northwest Arena
description:
Pickleball courts will be on the dry pad inside the Northwest Arena, the Arena is 55 degrees. We have paddles and balls to check out if you don't have your own.   
Always check our Calendar (northwestarena.com) for the update to date court times.

name: Park United Methodist Church
description: Large parking lot next to multipurpose bld. Cost $3

name: Russell Joy Park
description: Russell Joy Park is a place to play pickleball in Fredonia, NY. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights.

name: School St park
description: Come play pickleball at School St park in Findley Lake, NY! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Silver Creek Park
description: Silver Creek Park is a place to play pickleball in Silver Creek, NY. There are 3 acrylic courts. 2 are outdoors and 1 is indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.

name: St. Anthony's Church Hall
description: Come play pickleball at St. Anthony's Church Hall in Fredonia, NY! There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Steele Hall Fieldhouse
description: Please enter in the rear of the building. Parking is in the lot across the street #27. Fee is $3
open_play_schedule: Varies search on Team Reach Chautauqua Pickleball code nickpickleball

name: Town Building
description: Come play pickleball at Town Building in Mayville, NY! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Wright Park
description: Come play pickleball at Wright Park in Dunkirk, NY! There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility is wheelchair accessible.
